javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_CANCELED_AT_DEVICE
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description:
The job was canceled by an unidentified local user, i.e., a user at a
console at the device.

info.excerpt:
The job was canceled by an unidentified local user, i.e., a user at a
console at the device.

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_CANCELED_BY_OPERATOR
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description:
The job was canceled by the operator, i.e., by a user who has been
authenticated as having operator privileges (whether local or remote).

info.excerpt:
The job was canceled by the operator, i.e., by a user who has been
authenticated as having operator privileges (whether local or remote).

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_CANCELED_BY_USER
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description:
The job was canceled by the owner of the job, i.e., by a user whose
authenticated identity is the same as the value of the originating user
that created the Print Job, or by some other authorized end-user, such as
a member of the job owner's security group.

The job completed successfully.

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_COMPLETED_WITH_ERRORS
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description: The job completed with errors (and possibly warnings too).

The job completed with warnings.

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_DATA_INSUFFICIENT
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description:
The printer has created the Print Job, but the printer is expecting
additional print data before it can move the job into thePROCESSINGstate.

info.excerpt:
The printer has created the Print Job, but the printer is expecting
additional print data before it can move the job into thePROCESSINGstate.

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_INCOMING
javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.description:
The printer has created the Print Job, but the printer has not finished
accessing or accepting all the print data yet.

info.excerpt:
The printer has created the Print Job, but the printer has not finished

info.excerpt: This job is retained and is currently able to be restarted.

javax.print.attribute.standard/JobStateR.name: JOB_TRANSFORMING

representation.
